content: The intrinsic reward signal used to rank novel exploratory states in curiosity-driven RL (ICM/RND) can be repurposed as a dynamic memory pruning heuristic for 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents: only episodic memories that trigger high intrinsic curiosity (i.e., prediction error) are retained for future active learning query selection. This framework discards uninformative redundant memories while prioritizing surprising, high-impact experiences that maximize active learning data efficiency.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
